summary: iter197 Mobile Build 5 testing complete. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: OpsSnapshot and ActivityStrip render correctly for SALARY+ roles, correctly hidden for GENERAL role. Echo 'What just happened?' returns LLM-generated summary with headline.
critical_code_review_comments: OpsSnapshot component correctly fetches from /api/fresh-meals/ops-dashboard and displays 4 tiles: Kits today, Temp excursions, Out for delivery, Lane utilisation
ActivityStrip component correctly fetches from /api/timeline/recent and displays up to 6 recent events with relative timestamps
Echo 'What just happened?' button triggers POST /api/echo/whats-new with 30-min window, returns LLM summary via Claude Sonnet 4.5
Role gating works correctly: GENERAL role does NOT see OpsSnapshot, ActivityStrip, or FinanceTiles (only HomeSalary renders these)

All testids present and working: ops-snapshot, ops-packs-today, ops-temp-excursions, ops-out-for-delivery, ops-lane-util, activity-strip, whats-new-btn, whats-new-result, whats-new-headline, activity-event-{n}
Hiring drawer (manager+) opens and displays batches correctly
seed_data_creation: Minted fresh GENERAL role token for role-gating verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter197 Mobile Build 5 fully tested. New features: (1) OpsSnapshot component in HomeSalary shows Fresh Meal ops tiles (kits today, temp excursions, out for delivery, lane util) from /api/fresh-meals/ops-dashboard. (2) ActivityStrip component shows recent timeline events from /api/timeline/recent with 'What just happened?' button that calls /api/echo/whats-new (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM key). (3) Role gating verified: GENERAL role does NOT see these components, only SALARY+ roles do. All testids verified working. Regression tests passed for finance-tiles, hiring drawer, tab navigation.
